release_role: pilot consumer-validator and release blocker for transcript write-path safety
required_validation: pin shared RC reference, consume local RC in active venv via portable sibling source copied to writable /tmp editable-install path using venv python and --no-build-isolation, run required validation commands, and preserve runtime/CLI/API semantics
evidence_input: central-bundle SIGNOFF.json fields plus companion markdown evidence for validations, blocker scope, and rollback readiness
blocker_scope: transcript write-path safety drift, transcript-only applicability drift, facade/shared-surface drift, CLI/API semantic drift, or rollback-readiness failure
